forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Slight chance of a light shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Party cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Becoming cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Light winds.
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Light winds.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Light winds.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Light winds.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the east in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the north. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending east to southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers north of Hawker, slight chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog west of Ceduna in the early morning. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a light shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a light shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Stuart Highway, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Stuart Highway, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly and light increasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Oodnadatta in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers north of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
